name: Castle Keep
description: The central structure of your castle, providing defense and housing for your population. This is the heart of your kingdom.

name: Log Cabin
description: Small starter house for your citizens, usualy built outside the walls...

name: Large Log Cabin
description: Larger version of the standard log cabin, offering more space for your citizens...

name: Farmland
description: Basic farmland for growing crops. Provides food for your population.

name: Windmill
description: Generates power from the wind, providing energy for your settlement.

name: Donjon
description: A fortified tower within the castle, offering enhanced defense. It serves as a last line of defense and a symbol of power.
